title: Mock Final Exam - Part 1 (Module 1:Chapters 1-9)
description: Comprehensive assessment covering Lessons 1-9 of the course, including key concepts in Information Technology, computer hardware, software, data management, and networking fundamentals.
subject: Mock Final Exams

questions.question: Which of the following best describes the main purpose of Transaction Processing Systems (TPS)?
options: a) Assisting senior management in strategic decision making
b) Recording daily routine transactions of an organization
c) Providing high-level summaries for executives
d) Supporting knowledge workers in designing new products
questions.answer: b) Recording daily routine transactions of an organization
questions.rationale: TPS are designed to capture and process daily business transactions.

questions.question: What is the main distinction between an Information System and Information Technology?
options: a) Information Systems are hardware components only; Information Technology includes software only.
b) Information Systems include people and processes, while Information Technology mainly refers to hardware and software.
c) Information Technology is broader than Information Systems.
d) They are exactly the same with no difference.
questions.answer: b) Information Systems include people and processes, while Information Technology mainly refers to hardware and software.
questions.rationale: IS integrates people, processes, and technology; IT focuses on technology components.

questions.question: Which type of computer is primarily used for complex scientific calculations requiring immense processing power?
options: a) Minicomputer
b) Microcomputer
c) Supercomputer
d) Workstation
questions.rationale: Supercomputers are specialized for heavy computation tasks.

questions.question: In computer architecture, what is the primary function of the Control Unit within the CPU?
options: a) Performing arithmetic calculations
b) Storing frequently used instructions
c) Coordinating and controlling operations of the processor
d) Providing power to other components
questions.answer: c) Coordinating and controlling operations of the processor
questions.rationale: The Control Unit directs operations inside the CPU.

questions.question: Which memory type is non-volatile and typically stores firmware in a computer system?
options: a) RAM
b) Cache memory
c) ROM
d) Virtual memory
questions.rationale: ROM is non-volatile and holds firmware like BIOS.

questions.question: Which of the following correctly matches an Operating System to its purpose?
options: a) Linux - Proprietary software for embedded systems only
b) Windows Server - Managing server-based networks and resources
c) VxWorks - General productivity tasks on desktops
d) Android - Used primarily in large-scale data centers
questions.answer: b) Windows Server - Managing server-based networks and resources
questions.rationale: Windows Server is designed to manage networked servers.

questions.question: Which of the following best describes a key characteristic of SaaS (Software as a Service)?
options: a) It must be installed locally on every user's device.
b) It is always free and open-source.
c) It is accessed over the Internet, usually via subscription.
d) It requires no internet connection after installation.
questions.answer: c) It is accessed over the Internet, usually via subscription.
questions.rationale: SaaS is cloud-based and accessed via the Internet.

questions.question: An organization wants to ensure its software source code can be modified and redistributed under certain conditions. Which licensing type should it consider?
options: a) Commercial Software
b) Open-source Software
c) Shareware
d) Freeware
questions.rationale: Open-source licenses permit modification and redistribution.

questions.question: In the context of strategic IT use, what does achieving 'customer and supplier intimacy' primarily mean?
options: a) Improving internal operations only
b) Reducing costs through automation
c) Developing closer relationships with external stakeholders to improve services and loyalty
d) Replacing employees with AI systems
questions.answer: c) Developing closer relationships with external stakeholders to improve services and loyalty
questions.rationale: Customer and supplier intimacy strengthens external relationships.

questions.question: Which of the following storage types is considered volatile?
options: a) Hard Disk Drive
b) SSD
c) RAM
d) Optical Disc
questions.rationale: RAM loses data when power is off (volatile).
